cases.question: 最近订单总金额是多少？
cases.expectation: SQL executes and returns a single aggregate result

cases.question: 每个客户的订单金额汇总，按金额降序
cases.expectation: Grouped rows are returned and sorted by amount descending
cases.sample_sql:
SELECT "c"."customer_name" AS "customer_name",
       ROUND(SUM("o"."order_amount"), 2) AS "total_amount"
FROM "demo_sales"."customers" "c"
JOIN "demo_sales"."orders" "o" ON "c"."customer_id" = "o"."customer_id"
GROUP BY "c"."customer_name"
ORDER BY "total_amount" DESC
LIMIT 1000
sse_sql_fragments:
SELECT "c"."customer_name" AS "customer_name",
       ROUND(SUM("o"."order_amount"), 2) AS "total_amount"
FROM "demo_sales"."customers" "c"
JOIN "demo_sales"."orders" "o" ON "c"."customer_id" = "o"."customer_id"
GROUP BY "c"."customer_name"
ORDER BY "total_amount" DESC
LIMIT 1000

cases.question: 订单状态分别有多少条？
cases.expectation: Status dimension count rows are returned
cases.sample_sql:
SELECT "o"."order_status" AS "order_status",
       COUNT("o"."order_id") AS "count"
FROM "demo_sales"."orders" "o"
GROUP BY "o"."order_status"
ORDER BY "count" DESC
LIMIT 1000
sse_sql_fragments:
SELECT "o"."order_status" AS "order_status",
       COUNT("o"."order_id") AS "count"
FROM "demo_sales"."orders" "o"
GROUP BY "o"."order_status"
ORDER BY "count" DESC
LIMIT 1000
